data-acid-transactions.description: All command handlers execute within ACID transactions. @Transactional on command handlers ensures atomicity of domain operations + event publishing.

data-optimistic-locking.description: JPA @Version field on Endorsement and EAAccount entities prevents lost updates in concurrent modification scenarios.

data-flyway-migrations.description: All schema changes managed via Flyway versioned migrations. 20 migrations from V1 (endorsements table) through V20 (error resolution outcomes).

data-open-in-view-disabled.description: JPA open-in-view disabled to prevent lazy loading in controllers. All data must be eagerly fetched within the transactional boundary.

implementation.consequence: LazyInitializationException if accessed outside @Transactional — forces explicit fetch strategy

data-ddl-validation.description: Hibernate DDL auto mode set to 'validate' — Hibernate verifies entity mappings match database schema but never modifies it. All schema changes go through Flyway.

implementation.consequence: Application fails to start if entity-schema mismatch detected

data-batch-operations.description: JPA batch insert/update optimization enabled. Batch size 25 with ordered inserts and updates for optimal PostgreSQL performance.

data-connection-pool.description: HikariCP connection pool configured for cloud-native workloads. Leak detection enabled at 60s threshold.

data-kafka-producer-acks.description: Kafka producer acks=all ensures all in-sync replicas acknowledge before considering a message published. Prevents data loss.

data-state-machine-transitions.description: Endorsement state transitions validated by EndorsementStatus enum. Invalid transitions throw IllegalStateException, preventing data corruption.

implementation.validation: Compile-time exhaustiveness via sealed enum transitions

data-anti-corruption-layer.description: EndorsementMapper translates between JPA entities and domain models. Domain models never import JPA annotations; JPA entities never leak into handlers.

implementation.boundary: Only mapper knows both JPA and domain types
